claim: The prediction in atom ATOM_T013_S017_PRE_02 ("A really big one that I think also maybe not fully appreciated always is appl...") is the resolution of the blocker in atom ATOM_T009_S002_BLO_01 ("We can't fund every startup yet, but we can hopefully make this advice very g...").
